digest.title: OpenAI floats giving Trump administration 5 percent cut of AI boom
digest.tldr: OpenAI has floated giving the US government a 5 percent ownership stake as a way of easing tensions with the Trump administration and blunting mounting public backlash against AI, according to the Financial Times.
